name: playful
description: Fun cooking moments with ingredient splashes, bright pops of color, and a sense of joyful experimentation. This mood makes plant-based eating feel exciting and approachable — no rules, just delicious fun.

style.lighting: bright even lighting | pop of color backlighting | cheerful daylight
style.color_grade: bright saturated | pastel accents | high key warmth
style.camera: overhead flat lay | freeze frame splash | medium shot cooking action
style.composition: organized chaos of ingredients | color-blocked arrangements | hands in frame
style.props: colorful cutting boards, ingredient scatter, mixing bowls, apron, bright utensils, splatter guards

copy_tone: Light and bubbly, with casual language and playful puns. Uses food emoji energy without actual emojis. Makes cooking feel like play, not work. Approachable and never intimidating.
example_prompt_fragment: A fun overhead flat lay of colorful plant-based ingredients arranged on a bright pastel cutting board, tempeh chips mid-toss, bright splashes of turmeric powder, hands reaching in to grab ingredients, cheerful bright lighting, high-key color palette with greens and golds, playful food photography style
